---
title: "Discrepancy Tracker"
subtitle: "Suivi des divergences — nightly gaps between the City's reported capacity and the raw SMIS data"
description: "A running log of discrepancies between the City of Toronto's official overnight shelter counts and the raw SMIS data published on the Open Data portal, by date."
author: "Miriam Marling"
date: 2026-06-04
open-graph:
  title: "Discrepancy Tracker — Toronto Shelter Audit"
  description: "A running log of discrepancies between the City's official overnight shelter counts and the raw SMIS data, by date."
  site_name: "BonQuery — Data for the Greater Good"
twitter-card:
  card-style: summary
  title: "Discrepancy Tracker — Toronto Shelter Audit"
  description: "A running log of discrepancies between the City's official overnight shelter counts and the raw SMIS data, by date."
---

This page logs, night by night, the gap between the City of Toronto's reported
overnight capacity and the raw SMIS records published on the Open Data portal.
Each row records the City's official figure, our raw-data audit figure, and the
variance between them — so the public can see, on a daily basis, where the system
fails to meet the zero-unplaced target on nights reaching −5 °C.

*Cette page consigne, nuit après nuit, l'écart entre la capacité déclarée par la
Ville de Toronto et les données brutes du SMIS. Chaque ligne indique le nombre
officiel de la Ville, le nombre de notre audit, et l'écart entre les deux.*

**Table 1.** *Logged discrepancies between the City's official overnight counts
and the raw-data audit, by date. / Divergences consignées entre les nombres
officiels de la Ville et l'audit des données brutes, par date.*

| Date | City Official Count<br>*Nombre officiel de la Ville* | Raw Data Audit Count<br>*Nombre de l'audit (données brutes)* | Variance<br>*Écart* | Notes |
|---|--:|--:|--:|---|
| — | — | — | — | First audited entries forthcoming. / Premières entrées à venir. |

*Note.* Counts are overnight figures at the 4 a.m. Central Intake closeout.
Variance is the raw-data audit count minus the City's official count; a positive
value indicates the raw data shows more unplaced households than the official
figure reports. Source: City of Toronto Open Data (SMIS); BonQuery audit.
